upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yaTA sAvasAn (paSUn) kftvA prArjayet tAdfk tat' (jE0 brA0 138)
'aTa mAtfBirvatsAn samavArjanti' (Sa0 brA0 1713 25316) samavArjanti=yuYjanti vatsAnAM mAtfBiH saMyogamanujAnantItyarTaH
'taM tu vEvAhikaM dfzwvA kanyeyaM samupArjitam' (BA0 u0 17650) samupArjitam=saMskftam tam (vicitravIryam)
'svasti hEnamatyarjanti svargaM lokarmABa' (E0 brA0 111) atyarjanti gamayanti prApayanti atiH sOzWava iti zaqguru0 atiSabdaH kziprArTa iti govindasvAmI
'ati norjasyAkASaM naH kurviti' ( ) avakASaM naH prApayetyAha
